info.name: TRVE Dashboard API
info.description:
Auto-generated from server-go/docs/swagger.json. Re-run docs/postman/build-collection.js to refresh after API changes.

Auth: collection-level `Authorization: Bearer {{apiKey}}` is on every request. The legacy `X-User-ID: {{userId}}` header is added to every request as a *disabled* header — flip it on per-request if you need the legacy identity-assertion path (dev only).

Variables you set in the environment:
- `baseUrl` — e.g. `http://localhost:3001`
- `apiKey`  — `trve_…` token from Manage Mode → API Keys
- `userId`  — optional GUID, only used if you switch a request to the legacy header path

header.description: Legacy identity-assertion path (dev only). Disabled by default — Bearer token (collection auth) is preferred.

request.description:

Responses: 204, 404, 500

Create a new component

Create a new component (chart, control, or display) with optional data source binding and visualization config. Creates as version 1 with status "final".


Responses: 201, 400, 500

request.description:
Apply an import bundle

Writes the bundle's objects into the target namespace. Identical objects are skipped; conflicts are overwritten unless OverwriteDecisions explicitly opts out; blocked objects cause the whole apply to refuse.
